thig3.4:1.1: Coming out from my day’s abiding
thig3.4:1.2: on Vulture Peak Mountain, I saw on the bank of the river
thig3.4:1.3: an elephant emerged from its plunge.
thig3.4:2.1: A man holding a hook requested:
thig3.4:2.4: The man got up on the elephant.
thig3.4:3.1: Seeing what was untrained now tamed
thig3.4:3.3: with that I centered my mind—
thig3.4:3.4: why I’d gone to the woods in the first place.
